name: prompt-saver
description: Local offline prompt manager with floating quick-copy buttons
author: BG Coding

scripts.release:commit: git add -A && git commit -m "Prompt Saver 2.2.0: screenshot tool, prompt library search, copy history, expert menu, floating-button polish"
scripts.release:publish: gh release create v2.2.0 src-tauri/target/release/prompt-saver.exe "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/Prompt Saver_2.2.0_x64-setup.exe" --title "Prompt Saver 2.2.0" --notes-file docs/release-notes.md
